aka: Eloy de la Iglesia, Film Addict

cast.name: 何塞·萨克里斯坦 José Sacristán
费尔南多·古林·库弗 Fernando Guillén Cuervo

writer.name: 盖斯卡·乌雷斯蒂 Gaizka Urresti

director.name: 盖斯卡·乌雷斯蒂 Gaizka Urresti

this_title: Eloy de la Iglesia, adicto al cine
trans_title: Eloy de la Iglesia, Film Addict
introduction: A courageous film director, an “enfant terrible” in his early days, who fought against censorship and constantly pushed the boundaries of freedom of expression, chronicling the darkest side of Spain’s Transition, would fall into the depths of drug addiction. For more than a decade he would be forgotten, and at times even rejected, but he managed to emerge from ostracism to return to filmmaking, the addiction he was never able to quit.
foreign_title: Eloy de la Iglesia, adicto al cine
